title: amaryllis × amoena
intro: Amaryllis × amoena, also known as the amaryllis or belladonna lily, is a bulbous perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antitumor effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × amoena include treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and epilepsy, as well as its use in the treatment of pain and as an anesthetic. Amaryllis × amoena is traditionally prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, although caution is advised due to its toxicity.
